question: Company A sells a board game. According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year has the lowest copies sold in the entire period.
options.B: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified from this data.
options.C: The latest year shows a sharp decline in copies sold compared to previous years.
options.D: Copies sold per year has been steadily decreasing since 2012.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 5 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (969 copies) directly to full-year values like 2,423 copies creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
